name: Pumpkin Pie#3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, sugar, flour, cinnamon, and salt until well combined.
2. Stir in the pumpkin, milk, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
4. Place the pie in the preheated oven at 425°F (220°C).
5. Bake for 15 minutes.
6. Reduce the oven temperature to 375°F (190°C) and continue baking until the custard is set, about 25-30 more minutes.
Note: Turn off the heat when removing the pie from the oven.
